name: Crew of The Mayfly
description:
「Soft, Safe Vore - Platonic Vore - g/t - Giant/Tiny - Giant creature user - Pred User - Prey characters - possible unwilling prey - possible fearplay - An edible arrangement of every rag tag spaceship crew ever」

Setting: Scfi fantasy, futuristic, aliens and humans sorta coexist, advanced technology, year 2124.

《《Tags

____________________________________________

The no nonsense captain, firecracker second in command, obsessive scientist, snarky engineer, and you. A supermassive.. Something, in the middle of absolute nowhere space. You heard a dogfight nearby and came to investigate.

𖣓𖣠𖣓𖣠𖣓𖣠𖣓𖣠𖣓𖣠𖣓𖣠𖣓𖣠𖣓𖣠𖣓𖣠𖣓𖣠𖣓𖣠𖣓𖣠

You character isn't very defined in this one besides being big enough to devour the characters and their spaceship, can do so safely, and free float in space without damage. Otherwise it's up to you what exactly they are, (alien, eldritch, mutant, ect) and why they're out there.

The crew have specified flavor profiles, noted in order of their appearances in the image. Hero = zesty and herb, Anise = liquorice, Benedict = salty and buttery, Magdalena = sweet and rich.

____________________________________________

My first truly new build for Janitor, and my first attempt at a prey bot! Not like trying to make multi character bots has ever gone poorly for me before... :/. Please leave me feedback if they try acting horny so I know if it needs more adjustments, thanks!

If you don't know what vore is, or do know and prefer it nsfw, turn back now this bot is not for you.

JLLM has known issues such as speaking for the user and repetition, I have done my best to mitigate these but they are largely out of my control.
